# Generated by Flutter; do not edit.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.14)
project(cosmoscalc LANGUAGES CXX)

set(BINARY_NAME "cosmoscalc")
cmake_policy(SET CMP0063 NEW)

set(CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/run" CACHE PATH "..." FORCE)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

add_subdirectory("flutter")
add_subdirectory("runner")

install(TARGETS ${BINARY_NAME} RUNTIME DESTINATION "${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}")
install(FILES "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/runner/Release/flutter_windows.dll"
        DESTINATION "${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}")
